introduction: In the future, government legislation dictates all couples must pass the General Parenting Test to secure the qualification for parenthood. Successfully passing candidates are entitled to parenting benefits, guaranteed school districts, and substantial bonuses. Candidates who fail the test result in fines and discipline. A wealthy couple with outstanding financial and academic credentials but lacking practical skills; and an unexpectedly pregnant couple who are desperately cramming for the test. Can they both pass GPT with their perfect “plan”?
